content: The full triage loop is confirmed and implemented: eval → classify-prompt → agent classifies → mark-processed → eval again. The agent's entry point is SCHEDULED_PROMPT.md which tells the agent exactly what to do at each step without the agent needing to reason about it. Everything except the classification itself is deterministic.

provenance.raw_agent: bun run eval → finds next unprocessed pair, bun run classify-prompt → prints structured task prompt, <agent classifies> → writes proposals, bun run mark-processed → flips processed: true
provenance.raw_user: do it all. Also commit to a new repo.
provenance.what_was_ratified: The deterministic eval → classify-prompt → agent classifies → mark-processed → eval loop as the triage execution model
